scripts.backend: cd backend & venv\Scripts\activate & python manage.py runserver
scripts.backend:setup: cd backend & python -m venv venv & venv\Scripts\activate & pip install -r requirements.txt & python manage.py migrate
scripts.start: start cmd /k "cd backend & venv\Scripts\activate & python manage.py runserver" & timeout /t 3 /nobreak & npm run dev
